ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., All theft not mentioned elsewhere) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime category */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the crime (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of crime statistics */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the crime occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were recorded */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of reported crimes for the year */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Specific location where the crime occurred */,
  "time_of_occurrence" TEXT /* Time of the crime occurrence */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims */,
  "perpetrator_count" INTEGER /* Number of perpetrators */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, closed) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "crime_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the report */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported for that year */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "quality_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistics affected */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality issue */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the issue (1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "admin_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user who performed the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., data update, user management) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., data update, user management) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report, update) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., report_frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the setting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
